baseline.summary: A computer science student with a strong background in technical projects, aiming to join Quillmark Systems as a Technical Writing Intern. With a focus on detailed and accurate documentation and a knack for clear communication, I bring a unique blend of technical understanding and narrative skills to the team.

lines.text: Product & Design Intern at KuKClean, Bangalore (Jun–Jul 2024) — Managed end-to-end creative assets for e-commerce packaging and social media campaigns, contributing to the go-to-market launch of new products.

Technical Documentation Intern at CrowdSense (project), Bangalore (Jun–Sep 2023) — Developed detailed documentation for a real-time crowd-monitoring platform using Markdown and static-site doc tools, ensuring accuracy and clarity for non-technical users.
Programming languages: Python, C, SQL, HTML, CSS
Tools and platforms: Markdown, Docusaurus, GitHub Copilot, Git

cover_letter_paragraphs: Dear Hiring Manager at Quillmark Systems,

I am writing to express my strong interest in the Technical Writing Intern position within your Developer Relations team. With a robust background in technical projects and a keen eye for clear, accurate documentation, I am excited about the opportunity to contribute to your developer-focused environment.

My experience as a Product & Design Intern at KuKClean has equipped me with practical skills in managing end-to-end creative assets, including packaging design and social media campaigns. This role required detailed attention to detail and an ability to explain technical concepts in a manner accessible to diverse audiences, which aligns well with the responsibilities of this internship.

Moreover, my involvement as a Technical Documentation Intern at CrowdSense has honed my skills in writing comprehensive documentation using Markdown and static-site doc tools such as Docusaurus. I am particularly adept at ensuring accuracy and clarity, essential qualities for maintaining high-quality technical documentation that serves both developers and non-technical users.

I am eager to apply these skills at Quillmark Systems, where the focus on developer-friendly documentation will allow me to contribute effectively and learn from a team committed to clear communication. Thank you for considering my application; I look forward to the opportunity to discuss how my background and experience can support your team's goals.

violations: Line 1 (from 4d6f8b2e-5c3a-412d-b879-e0b750a3df10) claims 'Managed end-to-end creative assets for e-commerce packaging and social media campaigns' — no mention of this role in the Source.
Line 2 (from d7a8f6ca-fa5e-4442-bb9d-c7b0f7133c32) claims 'Developed detailed documentation for a real-time crowd-monitoring platform' — no mention of this role in the Source.
